news.title: 1 Billion XRP Unlocked From Ripple Escrow Accounts

summary.main: Ripple has executed its scheduled release of 1 billion XRP from cryptographic escrow.

news.title: Ripple Burns Nearly 180 Million RLUSD in Mere Hours

summary.main: Ripple's highly regulated RLUSD stablecoin recently experienced its largest single-day supply contraction in history.

news.title: Arizona Bitcoin Bill Nearing Final Vote, But It's Too Early to Celebrate

summary.main: Arizona lawmakers are nearing a final floor vote on a legislative package that would establish a state-level strategic cryptocurrency reserve.

news.title: Solana Crashes Against Ethereum, Will This Trend Reverse Soon?

summary.main: Solana's downtrend against Ethereum deepens, but indicators suggest that a reversal might not be far away.

news.title: Ripple Reveals New Partnership to Boost Corporate Cross-Border Payments

summary.main: Ripple enters another major partnership with Convera as it continues to push for crypto cross-border payments among enterprises across the globe.

news.title: $1.71 Trillion Franklin Templeton Director Expects All-Time Highs for Bitcoin in 2026 But Warns of Regulatory Headwinds

summary.main: Franklin Templeton Director Tony Pecore forecasts a "very positive year" for Bitcoin in 2026, with a new all-time high possible if only regulators or policy do not trigger headwinds.
